title: TrustForge Actor Identity Document
description: Identity document that binds an actor URI to public keys, authority roots, and validity (TF-0002).

identity_version.description: Version of the actor-identity document schema itself.

actor_id.description: Canonical actor URI this document identifies.

actor_type.description: Actor-type discriminator; must match the type embedded in actor_id.

instance_id.description: Optional instance URI when this document binds to a specific instance.

public_keys.description: Public keys associated with this actor.

trust_levels.description: Trust levels currently attributed to this actor.

authority_roots.description: Authority roots that vouch for this identity.

attestations.description: Opaque third-party attestations strengthening this identity.

valid_from.description: When this identity document becomes valid.

valid_until.description: When this identity document stops being valid.

revocation_ref.description: Hash reference to a revocation object, if this identity is revoked.

signature.description: Signature envelope over the canonical form of this document (not verified in the foundation phase).

PublicKey.description: A public-key entry for this actor.

key_id.description: Stable identifier for this key within the actor.

algorithm.description: Algorithm this key is used with.

purpose.description: What this key is used for.

valid_until.description: When this key stops being valid.

AuthorityRoot.description: Root of authority that vouches for this identity.
